# Climate Projections Explorer
> Public tool for exploring future climate projections and comparing locations worldwide.

## About
Climate Projections Explorer is a free, public web application that lets anyone search for any location on Earth and view projected climate data — including temperature trends, precipitation changes, and risk assessments — using advanced climate modeling data. No account required.

## Priority Pages

/ : Single-location climate projection tool — search for a city or place and explore its projected future climate across multiple decades and emissions scenarios.
/comparison : Multi-location climate comparison page — compare climate projections side-by-side for two or more locations to understand regional differences.

## Audience
General public, researchers, journalists, educators, and policymakers interested in understanding how climate change may affect specific locations.
